hero.name: Donathan
hero.subtitle: Software Engineer | Full-Stack
hero.description: Developer of efficient and scalable solutions. Passionate about technology and innovation.

about.title: About
about.p1: I hold a Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering (2024) and have over 4 years of experience in the Robert Bosch ecosystem, where I progressed from Apprentice to Technical Expert. My journey is marked by the development of robust solutions and a passion for transforming complex logic into efficient systems.
about.p2: Currently, as a Technical Instructor at SENAI, I focus on developing full-stack projects and implementing DevOps routines (Azure DevOps). I am transitioning to the market as a Junior Software Engineer, seeking to apply my expertise in JavaScript (Node/React), Python (Django), and C# to solve real-world engineering challenges.
about.p3: Complementing my technical foundation, I possess Advanced English proficiency, consolidated through an exchange program at the Centre of English Studies in Ireland. This international experience enables me to consume original documentation firsthand, collaborate with global teams, and adapt quickly to multicultural environments.

description: In this position, I operate at the intersection of teaching and practical software development.
Development and architecture of Full Stack educational projects, using agile methodologies (Scrum/Kanban) to simulate real-world software environments.
Creation of internal automation tools in Python for data processing (ETL), optimizing the transition of complex data between spreadsheets and structured formats.
Technologies: React, Node.js, Python, MongoDB, Azure DevOps, and Git.

jobs.role: Internship of Immersion and International Experience
description: A period dedicated to improving English proficiency and adapting to the European job market.
Studies at the Centre of English Studies, combined with hands-on experience in customer service within fast-paced restaurant environments.
Development of intercultural communication, problem-solving skills, and leadership in dynamic, high-pressure settings.

jobs.role: Tech Lead & Technical Instructor of TI
description: Led the technical development of internal solutions, focusing on data management and performance.
Competency Management System: Acted as the lead developer on a Full Stack platform (.NET/React), from SQL Server database modeling to the final user interface.
Application of design patterns (MVC, DDD) and REST API integration to ensure system modularity.
Responsible for teaching and conducting technical code reviews, ensuring the quality and security of deliverables.
Technologies: C#, .NET Core, React, SQL Server, REST APIs, Git, and Linux.
Early career focus on automation and industrial data analysis.
Development of Python scripts and C++/Arduino logic for system integration and automation of routine tasks.
Creation of dynamic Power BI dashboards to support data-driven decision-making.
Development of web interfaces (HTML/CSS) for internal tools.

items.title: Training Solution with AI
items.description: Solution conceived in 36h to optimize customer service processes through AI. Phase of discovery (5W2H, personas), requirements engineering and prototyping.

items.title: Personal Portfolio
items.description: Personal portfolio focused on performance, internationalization (i18n) and minimalist design. The code reflects my concern with clean architecture, componentization and repository organization.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's talk?
contact.description: I am open to new opportunities and challenges. If you have a position, a project or just want to exchange an idea about technology, feel free to send me a message!

footer.built: Developed with React + Vite + Tailwind CSS
